## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and contains no unrelated work.
- [ ] Tests, formatting, builds, and relevant audits pass.
- [ ] Security, privacy, and accessibility impacts were reviewed.
- [ ] Documentation and metadata remain accurate where affected.
- [ ] Deployment and rollback requirements are understood.
- [ ] No secrets, private production data, or draft content were introduced.
